title: Named-Prescriber Enforcement Forborne
content: DOPL forgoes unlawful-conduct and unprofessional-conduct enforcement under §58-1-501(1)-(2) and related professional-licensing provisions against any provider who (1) acts solely as the named prescriber for AI-authorized renewals, (2) does not interact directly with a patient or other provider, and (3) complies with the RMA terms. Forbearance applies only to conduct authorized by the agreement.
